title: Fidelity National Information Services: Market Sentiment Is On The Wrong Side Again
text: After losing nearly 60% of its value, FIS has turned into a bitter disappointment for shareholders, but this is likely to change. The management has made a major step in the right direction with the decision to sell its controlling stake in Worldpay. FIS appears too conservatively priced relative to its business fundamentals.

title: Why Is Fidelity National (FIS) Down 2.5% Since Last Earnings Report?
text: Fidelity National (FIS) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?
